visualizerText:
PIPELINE VISUALIZER / PHASE 1
Inspect the build contract, trace real events, propose the next safe change.
PHASE_1_CATALOG_ONLY
Inspect
9 STAGES
INTAKE
request enters Studio build path before parallelBuild
classification
PARALLEL_BUILD_START
parallelBuild() entry
start
PAGE_INVENTORY
specPages normalized into output filenames
page_inventory
TEMPLATE_GENERATION
shared template prompt built and executed
template_start, template_written, template_failed, template_empty
TEMPLATE_ARTIFACTS
template parsed into reusable context
template_written, template_incomplete
PAGE_GENERATION
page prompts fan out through SDK or subscription route
pages_start, page_written, page_failed
POST_PROCESSING
generated files are normalized after page writes
post_process, slot_registration, seo_validation
VERIFICATION
build verification runs and result is persisted
run_build_verification
COMPLETION
Studio sends completion messages and optional repo creation
assistant_complete, repo_create
Trace
0 LIVE EVENTS

No live trace events found for the active site yet. Run a Studio build to populate this lane.

Propose
REVIEW-FIRST
1
Keep phase 1 read-only

Use catalog + trace visibility before changing execution order.

2
Generate a fresh trace run

Run a small build, then verify every catalog stage has at least one proof event.

3
Promote to declarative data stage by stage

Start with page_inventory because it has bounded inputs, outputs, and proof events.
